demo.title: build-phases.sh
demo.code:
# Phase 1 — Local fork (contracts + UI on localhost)
yarn fork --network base && yarn start

# Phase 2 — Live testnet
yarn deploy --network baseSepolia && yarn start

# Phase 3 — Production
yarn build && yarn ipfs-deploy

# Secret safety protocol — NEVER commit:
# .env  |  private keys  |  RPC keys  |  API keys
# Bots scrape GitHub in real-time and exploit within seconds
